nasb.text: These are the people whom Nebuchadnezzar carried away into exile: in the seventh year 3,023 Jews;

esv.text: This is the number of the people whom Nebuchadnezzar carried away captive: in the seventh year, 3,023 Judeans;

cnv.text: 以下是尼布甲尼撒擄去的人民的數目：在他執政第七年，有猶大人三千零二十三名；

ccb.text: 以下是尼布甲尼撒掳去的人数：他执政第七年掳去三千零二十三名犹大人；
